pi_items.metadata_value: 6 items x 15 points = 90 points, plus 10 points for anti-gaming = 100 total
pi_items.verified_value: 3 domains × 2 settings (disk + bandwidth) = 6 items × 15 points = 90 points + 10 anti-gaming = 100 total. Verified at verifier.py lines 84-86.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures three virtual server domains (acmecorp.test: 2048 MB disk, 10 GB bandwidth; greenleaf.test: 1024 MB disk, 5 GB bandwidth; craftworks.test: 512 MB disk, 2 GB bandwidth) in Virtualmin at https://localhost:10000 using root credentials. Target values are synthetic task specifications. Note: environment setup script creates different domains (brightstar.test, greenvalley.test) than the task expects; greenleaf.test and craftworks.test are created dynamically by task setup. Verifier uses hardcoded tolerance calculations (±5% or ±50-100 MB absolute) that override the metadata tolerance values which are unused.
